classes.label: Land
classes.description: A piece of land associated with an educational institution.

classes.label: Building
classes.description: A structure or building on the land.

classes.label: Building Renovation
classes.description: A renovation event for a building.
evidence: 修缮开始日期 (Renovation Start Date)

datatype_properties.label: Land Address
datatype_properties.description: The address of the land.

datatype_properties.label: Land Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: The certificate number for the land.

datatype_properties.label: Building Number
datatype_properties.description: School-assigned building number.

datatype_properties.label: Building Name
datatype_properties.description: The Chinese name of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Property Right Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for property rights of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Usage Status Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for usage status of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for building category.

datatype_properties.label: Building Structure Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for building structure.

datatype_properties.label: Number of Floors
datatype_properties.description: Number of floors including basement, unit: floor.
evidence: 建筑物层数 (含地下室，单位：层)

datatype_properties.label: Completion Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the building was completed.

datatype_properties.label: Total Investment
datatype_properties.description: Total investment in the building, unit: Yuan.
evidence: 建筑物投资总额 (单位：元)

datatype_properties.label: Funding Source Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the source of funding.

datatype_properties.label: Total Floor Area
datatype_properties.description: Total floor area, unit: square meters.
evidence: 总建筑面积 (单位：平方米)

datatype_properties.label: Total Usable Area
datatype_properties.description: Total usable area, unit: square meters.
evidence: 总使用面积 (单位：平方米)

datatype_properties.label: Seismic Fortification Intensity Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for seismic fortification intensity.

datatype_properties.label: Seismic Fortification Standard Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for seismic fortification standard.

datatype_properties.label: Building Address
datatype_properties.description: Detailed address of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Condition Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for building condition.

datatype_properties.label: Building Photo
datatype_properties.description: Photo of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Building Floor Plan
datatype_properties.description: Architectural floor plan of the building.

datatype_properties.label: Ownership Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Ownership certificate number.

datatype_properties.label: Building Footprint Area
datatype_properties.description: Area the building occupies, unit: square meters.
evidence: 建筑物占地面积 (单位：平方米)

datatype_properties.label: Design Service Life
datatype_properties.description: Design service life, unit: years.

datatype_properties.label: Room Number
datatype_properties.description: School-assigned room number. Suggested first 6 digits are building number, last 6 are room number within building.
evidence: 房间号 (学校自编，建议前6位为建筑物编号，后6位为房间在该建筑物内的编号)

datatype_properties.label: Room Name
datatype_properties.description: Chinese name of the room.

datatype_properties.label: Room Usage Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for room usage.

datatype_properties.label: Room Floor
datatype_properties.description: Floor where the room is located. Above ground uses Arabic numerals, below ground adds 'B' prefix.
evidence: 房间楼层 (指房间所在的楼层，地上楼层直接用阿拉伯数字表示，地下楼层在阿拉伯数字前加“B”)

datatype_properties.label: Room Floor Area
datatype_properties.description: Floor area of the room, unit: square meters.
evidence: 房间建筑面积 (单位：平方米)

datatype_properties.label: Room Usable Area
datatype_properties.description: Usable area of the room, unit: square meters.
evidence: 房间使用面积 (单位：平方米)

datatype_properties.label: Renovation Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Start date of the renovation.

object_properties.label: has Building
object_properties.description: A land parcel has buildings on it.
evidence: Land Address and Building Number are in the same section

object_properties.label: has Room
evidence: Room number suggests first 6 digits are building number

object_properties.label: has Renovation
evidence: Building and Renovation are in the same section

relations.subject: Room
evidence: 房间号 (学校自编，建议前6位为建筑物编号，后6位为房间在该建筑物内的编号)
